title: AI-assisted is not AI-first
subtitle: The difference isn't tooling. It's whether the workflow was redesigned around agents, or agents were bolted onto a workflow built for humans.
caption: Framing for editorial use.

left.label: AI-assisted
left.title: Bolt AI onto the existing workflow
items: Engineers keep doing what they did before
Org shape, process, and roles stay the same

right.label: AI-first
right.title: Redesign the workflow around agents
items: Agents do the keystrokes; humans make the judgment
Multiplicative gain — small teams do what large ones used to
Roles, review, and team shape all change
